summary: Comprehensive re-testing of Vaal Vibes PWA after main agent fixes. All previously reported critical issues have been successfully resolved. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), and frontend functionality fully operational with excellent user experience.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (100% success rate - 36/36 tests passed)
Customer login form selectors now target actual input elements (FIXED)
Menu page shows 22 visible menu items by default (FIXED)
Demo customer login works perfectly from frontend
Customer register -> wallet -> request flow works end-to-end
Customer wallet displays promo codes correctly
Menu item request drawer opens and functions properly
Admin login works with MFA code 246810
Admin dashboard loads with KPIs, charts, and recent requests
Promo validation and redeem works from frontend/backend (FIXED)
Events and specials admin management accessible
PWA manifest is valid and complete
Promo signature validation after repair fix
